chapter_title.en: Chapter 179 – The Masturbation and copulating with the animals

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/385)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/385)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الدَّلْكِ قَالَ نَاكِحُ نَفْسِهِ لَا شَيْ‏ءَ عَلَيْهِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Abu Yahya Al Wasity, from Ismail Al Basry, from Zurara Bin Ayn,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the rubbing (the manhood). He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He is having sex with himself, there is nothing upon it’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from has narrated from abu Yahya al-Wasitiy from ‘Isma’il al-Basriy from Zurarah ibn ’A‘yun who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about one’s playing to cause his semen to discharge. He (the Imam) said, ‘He is like going to bed with himself and there is no punishment on him (but it is like fornication as regards to sinfulness).”’
